name: delete_reply
description: Tool to delete a specific reply by reply id. use when you need to remove a reply from a comment on a file.

file_id.description:
The ID of the file.
Example: "1ZdR3L3Kek7szY1j11SQZ9A_00up1j2xG"

reply_id.description:
The ID of the reply.
Example: "AAAA_example_reply_id"

comment_id.description:
The ID of the comment.
Example: "AAAA_example_comment_id"
